title: File Cache Package Declaration
description: The 'filecache' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture houses a package declaration for file caching operations. This package, as per the 'package-info.java' file, serves as a namespace for organizing related classes and interfaces. It doesn't contain any core logic or algorithms, but rather sets the stage for the file caching functionalities. The package imports necessary classes, such as 'InterfaceAudience' from 'org.apache.hadoop.classification', to define the intended audience of the package. This directory follows a simple architectural role, primarily that of namespace organization, adhering to the principles of modular and maintainable software design.
